items.summary: The final-round ultimatum branch now updates the round snapshot and canonical round compliance/fix evidence before terminal closeout, and PM-003 is now restricted to the canonical four-count shape across run and cycle postmortems.
Run-postmortem and cycle-postmortem now read the same post-ultimatum self-check source because the ultimatum branch updates roundResult.selfCheckIssues before closeout.
Cycle review_issue_count now uses the same recognized-severity filtering as the board-side postmortem writer, eliminating the latent counting divergence.
